SELECT toInt128(value) FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '%128%';
SELECT toInt128(-128) AS neg_int, toInt128(128.8) AS pos_int FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE joined_table (id UInt64, value String);
SELECT A.id, toInt128(A.value) AS converted_value FROM test_table AS A JOIN joined_table AS B ON A.value = B.value;
WITH (SELECT SUM(toInt128(value)) FROM test_table) AS total FROM test_table WHERE total > 0;
SELECT toInt128(toString(1.9)) AS rounded_value FROM test_table;
SELECT toInt128(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
SELECT toInt128(IF(value NOT IN ('NaN', 'Inf'), value, '0')) AS converted_value FROM test_table;
